stories.story: Create src/diagnostics.rs with Diagnostics struct, Severity enum (Allow/Warning/Error), DiagnosticConfig with per-category severity fields, and fatal() checkpoint method.
Define diagnostic categories: ParseError, TypeError, BorrowError, MirError, CodegenError, UnusedVariable, UnusedImport, UnreachableCode, DeprecatedSyntax.
Wire Diagnostics through lib.rs check_source_full() — replace all early-exit error handling with diagnostic accumulation.
Add CLI flags --warn, --deny, --allow to src/main.rs and propagate to DiagnosticConfig.
Implement grouped, colored display: errors red, warnings yellow, grouped by file then phase, with source spans.
Write unit tests for Diagnostics (accumulation, fatal checkpoint, severity override, display formatting).

definitionOfDone.item: All 1,034 existing tests pass.
Diagnostics accumulate errors from parse + typecheck + codegen in a single compilation.
fatal() returns Ok when no errors, Err when errors accumulated.
--warn/--deny/--allow flags modify severity correctly.
At least 15 new tests for diagnostics module.

stories.story: Create src/mir/transform/mod.rs with Pass trait (fn run(&mut MirProgram, &mut Diagnostics)) and PassManager struct.
Create src/mir/transform/dead_code.rs — dead function elimination via call graph reachability from main.
Create src/mir/transform/const_fold.rs — constant folding for scalar arithmetic and tensor shape expressions.
Integrate PassManager into lib.rs pipeline between TAST-to-MIR lowering and LLVM codegen.
Add -Odead-code and -Oconst-fold CLI flags. Add -Oall to enable all passes.
Write unit and integration tests for each pass and for PassManager orchestration.

definitionOfDone.item: PassManager runs passes in configurable order.
Dead code elimination removes unreachable functions.
Constant folding evaluates constant scalar expressions at compile time.
Each pass is individually toggleable via CLI flags.
At least 20 new tests across both passes and PassManager.

stories.story: Create src/interner.rs with global NameInterner using thread-safe arena allocation.
Define Name type as interned handle with Deref to &str, O(1) Eq/Hash.
Replace String identifiers in AST node types with Name.
Update parser to intern all identifiers during parsing.
Verify TypeInterner and NameInterner coexist without interference.

definitionOfDone.item: All identifier comparisons are O(1) via pointer equality.
Memory usage reduced on sample programs (measured).
All 1,034+ tests pass.
TypeInterner unaffected.

stories.story: Add stacker = "0.1" to Cargo.toml.
Wrap recursive descent calls in parser.rs with maybe_grow(32KB, 1MB).
Wrap recursive unification in typeck.rs with maybe_grow.
Wrap recursive MIR traversals in mir.rs with maybe_grow.
Add test with 200-level nested expression to verify no stack overflow.

definitionOfDone.item: Deeply nested programs (200+ levels) compile without stack overflow.
No performance regression on normal programs.

stories.story: Add insta = "1.34" to [dev-dependencies] in Cargo.toml.
Create tests/snapshot_tests.rs with test harness for .axon input files.
Create tests/snapshots/ with subdirectories: parse/, typecheck/, mir/, llvm_ir/, errors/.
Write 40+ error message snapshot tests covering all error codes.
Write 30+ parser output snapshot tests for all syntax constructs.
Write 20+ MIR dump snapshot tests for key code patterns.
Write 10+ LLVM IR snapshot tests for codegen verification.
Document snapshot workflow: cargo insta test, cargo insta review.

definitionOfDone.item: insta builds and snapshot workflow functions.
At least 100 snapshot tests across all categories.
Error message snapshots cover all error code ranges.
Snapshot review workflow documented in .dev/SNAPSHOT_TESTING.md.

stories.story: Create src/mir/transform/float_combinators.rs — identify closed tensor subexpressions and extract to top-level functions.
Create src/mir/transform/inline.rs — inline trivial functions (single basic block, no loops) and single-use extracted combinators.
Implement free-variable analysis for MIR basic blocks to identify extraction candidates.
Write tests verifying extraction correctness and inlining decisions.

definitionOfDone.item: Closed tensor op sequences are extracted to top-level functions.
Trivial functions are inlined back when beneficial.
Extraction does not change program semantics.
At least 15 new tests.

stories.story: Create src/mir/transform/fuse_ops.rs with FusionPattern trait and pattern registry.
Implement linear+relu fusion pattern: detect matmul→add→relu sequence, replace with fused_linear_relu call.
Implement element-wise chain fusion: detect N consecutive element-wise ops on same shape, replace with single-pass kernel.
Implement MSE loss fusion: detect subtract→square→mean, replace with fused_mse.
Implement softmax+cross_entropy fusion.
Add fused kernel C implementations to src/codegen/runtime.rs: axon_fused_linear_relu, axon_fused_mse, axon_fused_softmax_ce, axon_fused_elementwise.
Add MIR TensorOp variants for fused operations.
Update LLVM codegen to emit calls to fused runtime functions.
Write numerical equivalence tests: fused output == unfused output within 1e-6.
Write criterion benchmarks comparing fused vs unfused throughput.
Add -Ofuse-ops CLI flag.

definitionOfDone.item: All 5 fusion patterns produce correct output.
Numerical equivalence: epsilon < 1e-6 for all patterns.
Element-wise chain fusion achieves >=3x throughput vs unfused.
Fusion does not cross control flow boundaries.
-Ofuse-ops flag toggles fusion on/off.
At least 30 new tests.

stories.story: Create src/mir/transform/parallelize.rs with tensor operation DAG builder.
Implement data dependency analysis: identify read/write sets for each tensor operation.
Identify independent subgraphs (no shared data dependencies) suitable for parallel execution.
Annotate MIR with ParallelRegion markers for independent subgraphs.
Add lightweight thread pool to runtime.rs: axon_parallel_dispatch, axon_parallel_join.
Update LLVM codegen to emit thread pool dispatch for parallel regions.
Write correctness tests: parallel results == sequential results for all test programs.
Write scaling benchmarks on 1, 2, 4, 8 cores.
Add -Oparallelize CLI flag.

definitionOfDone.item: Independent tensor ops execute concurrently.
>=2x scaling on 4 cores for independent matmul workloads.
Parallel results identical to sequential.
Side-effecting ops never parallelized.
At least 20 new tests.

stories.story: Add Fold and Reduce tokens to src/token.rs and keyword lookup.
Add FoldExpr, ReduceExpr, Comprehension AST nodes to src/ast.rs.
Parse fold/reduce expressions and list/tensor comprehensions in src/parser.rs.
Type-check fold (infer accumulator type from init + closure), reduce (element type), comprehensions (iter element → result).
Lower fold/reduce to MIR: desugar to loop + accumulator, with parallel reduction hint.
Lower comprehensions to MIR: desugar to iterator chain + collect.
Write tests covering fold, reduce, and comprehension on Vec, Tensor, Range.
Update language tour documentation with fold/reduce/comprehension examples.

definitionOfDone.item: fold, reduce, and comprehensions parse correctly.
Type checking infers correct types for all forms.
Codegen produces correct results.
At least 20 new tests.
Documentation updated.

stories.story: Add Linear and Unique tokens to src/token.rs.
Add LinearParam annotation to function parameter AST nodes.
Parse linear/unique annotations on function parameters in src/parser.rs.
Type-check linearity: linear params must be used exactly once in function body.
Integrate linearity checking into borrow checker (src/borrow.rs).
Codegen optimization: skip reference counting for linear parameters.
Verify zero-copy on 5+ common tensor patterns: forward pass, gradient update, data pipeline, reshape chain, activation chain.

definitionOfDone.item: linear annotation enforced — multi-use is compile error with clear message.
Zero-copy verified on 5+ patterns via allocation tracking.
Opt-in — existing code unaffected.
At least 15 new tests.

stories.story: Add --enum-layout CLI flag with options: tagged (default), packed, scattered.
Implement tagged layout in codegen (current behavior, documented).
Implement packed layout: integer tag + flat payload, no pointers.
Write benchmarks comparing layout performance for Option<Tensor> and Result<Tensor, E>.

definitionOfDone.item: --enum-layout flag produces different codegen for tagged vs packed.
Benchmarks show measurable improvement for packed layout in tight loops.
Default (tagged) behavior unchanged.

stories.story: Add With and Ask tokens to src/token.rs (if not already present).
Add WithBlock and AskExpr AST nodes to src/ast.rs.
Parse with-block syntax: with Type: ask pat = expr; body.
Desugar with-blocks to bind chain: Type.bind(expr, |pat| body).
Type-check with-blocks: verify bind and wrap methods exist on context type.
Write tests for with-blocks with IO, Result, and Option contexts.

definitionOfDone.item: with-blocks parse, desugar, type-check, and codegen correctly.
Works with IO, Result, and Option as context types.
At least 10 new tests.

stories.story: Update language tour with fold, reduce, comprehension, with-block, and linear examples.
Update tensor guide with fusion behavior and parallel execution notes.
Update CLI reference with all new -O flags and --enum-layout.
Add "Optimizations" section to compiler documentation.
Update from-python and from-pytorch migration guides with new syntax.
Rebuild documentation.html.

definitionOfDone.item: All new features documented with examples.
Migration guides updated.
documentation.html rebuilt and deployed.

stories.story: Write design document: GPU warp divergence branchless transform pass.
Write design document: math-notation @math block syntax and parser.
Write design document: shape-specialized function compilation (monomorphize for known shapes).
Include performance projections and comparison benchmarks vs XLA/Triton.

definitionOfDone.item: Design documents complete with architecture, data flow, pseudocode.
Performance projections include concrete target numbers.
No dead code introduced — designs only.
